metadata.description: JSON 处理: `json.dumps(obj, ensure_ascii=False)` serializes an object to a JSON formatted str. `json.loads(str)` deserializes a JSON formatted string back into a Python object. Python code examples: Serializing with `ensure_ascii=False`: ```python import json data = {"name": "张三", "age": 30} # A dictionary containing non-ASCII characters json_str = json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False) print(json_str) # Output: {"name": "\u5927\u4e09", "age": 30} ``` Deserializing: ```python import json json_str = '{"name": "\u5927\u4e09", "age": 30}' # A JSON string data = json.loads(json_str) print(data) # Output: {'name': '张三', 'age': 30} ```

Python code examples: Serializing with `ensure_ascii=False`: ```python import json data = {"name": "张三", "age": 30} # A dictionary containing non-ASCII characters json_str = json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False) print(json_str) # Output: {"name": "\u5927\u4e09", "age": 30} ``` Deserializing: ```python import json json_str = '{"name": "\u5927\u4e09", "age": 30}' # A JSON string data = json.loads(json_str) print(data) # Output: {'name': '张三', 'age': 30} ```
